title: Is possible to reopen a sprint after closing it by mistake?
excerpt:
Hi everyone, I just closed a sprint by mistake and I had several tasks there, so I’m looking for an option to revert that step or reopen the sprint if possible. 
Thank you!

posts.author: jonathan.lopez.ktt (Jonathan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, I just closed a sprint by mistake and I had several tasks there, so I’m looking for an option to revert that step or reopen the sprint if possible.
Thank you!

posts.author: mike158 (mike)
posts.cookedHtml: No, once a sprint is closed in most project management tools like Jira, it cannot be reopened. You can create a new sprint and move the unfinished tasks to it as a workaround. receiptify spotify login
